name: Powershell Remote Thread Creation
notes: This rule detects Powershell injecting code into critical Windows processes.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001845) CreateRemoteThread
when the event matches Process Path (custom) contains any of [powershell_ise.exe or powershell.exe]

when the event matches "Target Process Full Full Name" ILIKE 'svchost.exe' OR "Target Process Full Full Name" ILIKE 'csrss.exe' OR "Target Process Full Full Name" ILIKE 'gpupdate.exe' OR "Target Process Full Full Full Full Full Full Name" ILIKE 'explorer.exe' OR "Target Process Full Full Full Full Full Full Name" ILIKE 'services.exe' OR "Target Process Full Full Full Full Full Full Name" ILIKE 'winlogon.exe' OR "Target Process Full Full Full Full Full Full Name" ILIKE 'smss.exe' OR "Target Process Full Full Full Full Full Full Name" ILIKE 'wininit.exe' OR "Target Process Full Full Full Full Full Full Name" ILIKE 'userinit.exe' OR "Target Process Full Full Full Full Full Full Name" ILIKE 'spoolsv.exe' OR "Target Process Full Full Full Full Full Full Name" ILIKE 'taskhost.exe' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Powershell Remote Thread Creation on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001845) CreateRemoteThread
AND when the event matches Process Path (custom) contains any of [powershell_ise.exe or powershell.exe]

AND when the event matches "Target Process Full Full Name" ILIKE 'svchost.exe' OR "Target Process Full Full Name" ILIKE 'csrss.exe' OR "Target Process Full Full Name" ILIKE 'gpupdate.exe' OR "Target Process Full Full Full Full Full Full Name" ILIKE 'explorer.exe' OR "Target Process Full Full Full Full Full Full Name" ILIKE 'services.exe' OR "Target Process Full Full Full Full Full Full Name" ILIKE 'winlogon.exe' OR "Target Process Full Full Full Full Full Full Name" ILIKE 'smss.exe' OR "Target Process Full Full Full Full Full Full Name" ILIKE 'wininit.exe' OR "Target Process Full Full Full Full Full Full Name" ILIKE 'userinit.exe' OR "Target Process Full Full Full Full Full Full Name" ILIKE 'spoolsv.exe' OR "Target Process Full Full Full Full Full Full Name" ILIKE 'taskhost.exe' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Powershell Remote Thread Creation
Event description: Detects Powershell injecting code into critical Windows processes.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
